mapper.select: select wq.problem_id as problemId, p.difficulty as difficulty, wq.last_wrong_type as lastWrongType, wq.wrong_count as wrongCount from wrong_questions wq join problems p on p.id = wq.problem_id where wq.user_id = #{userId} order by wq.wrong_count desc, wq.last_wrong_at desc limit #{limit}

select distinct pt.tag_id from problem_tags pt where pt.problem_id in
#{id}
